name: vitest-midscene-addon
description: Enhance Vitest with Midscene for smarter, easier UI testing across Web, Android, and iOS
abstract: Skill for setting up projects, generating, updating, debugging, and running AI-driven E2E tests. Uses Midscene for natural-language UI interaction, Vitest as the test framework, and Playwright/ADB/WDA for platform automation.
author: midscene
scope: Project setup, E2E test writing, updating, debugging, and execution
